reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar la atención de Patricia De Mestico de la oficina del automovil club argentino, me informo muy bien y me asocio al Aca. También me asesoro muy bien para hacer el curso de conducción de la escuela Fangio, el cual voy a tomar. Da gusto venir y que te atiendan tan bien.  Recomendable. Saludos

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the excellent service I received from Patricia De Mestico at the Argentine Automobile Club office. She provided me with very good information and helped me become a member. She also gave me great advice about the driving course at the Fangio Driving School, which I will be taking. It's a pleasure to come here and receive such excellent service. Highly recommended. Best regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOcE1tTnFNbkE0ZDI5WVVqQkdXalk1UmxkWlkxRRAB
